ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department's functions */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of department */,
  "head_of_department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the head of department */,
  "department_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "department_email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the contact belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the contact */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number for the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the contact */,
  "given_name" TEXT /* Given name of the contact person */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Family name of the contact person */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES contact_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact information being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, phone, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_logs" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
